title: WorkForm no longer displays in Embed Everything dashboard widget
excerpt: My Embed Everything widget on a dashboard suddenly stopped displaying a WorkForm I’ve been embedding for months. It now shows the “We can’t display this link. In the meantime, a dancing Llama!” message. Nothing has chang…

posts.author: jpeerson (Jaret)
posts.cookedHtml:
My Embed Everything widget on a dashboard suddenly stopped displaying a WorkForm I’ve been embedding for months. It now shows the “We can’t display this link. In the meantime, a dancing Llama!” message. Nothing has changed on my end, and the same link works outside the dashboard.

Was there a recent update to iframe or embed settings that might have caused this? I’d appreciate any help getting this working again.

posts.author: jameswood32 (James Wood )
posts.cookedHtml:
If your WorkForm isn’t showing in the Embed Everything dashboard widget, it’s usually due to one of the following issues:

  1. Widget Configuration Changed:

    • Check that the Embed Everything widget settings still point to the correct WorkForm URL or ID.

    • Sometimes updates or edits in the dashboard can break the connection.

  2. WorkForm Permissions:

    • Ensure the WorkForm is still shared publicly or with the appropriate users.

    • If it was restricted or unshared, the widget won’t be able to display it.

  3. Browser / Cache Issues:

    • Clear your browser cache or try a different browser.

    • Some widgets rely on cached scripts that may fail after updates.

  4. Embed Code Changes:

    • If WorkForm updated its embed code, make sure your widget uses the latest embed snippet.

    • Old embed codes might stop working after platform updates.

  5. Platform Updates / Bugs:

    • Occasionally, updates to either Embed Everything or WorkForm can temporarily break integrations.

    • Check their status pages or support forums for any known issues.

Quick Fix Tips:

  • Re-add the WorkForm to the widget using the current embed link.

  • Confirm your dashboard and WorkForm are on compatible versions.

  • Test the embed in a simple HTML page to see if it loads outside the dashboard—this helps identify whether the problem is with WorkForm or the dashboard widget itself.
